title: Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
summary: Voluntary framework organized around Govern, Map, Measure, and Manage functions for AI risk management.
auditUse: Use as the main organizing framework for AI risk governance and control mapping.

title: Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework: Generative Artificial Intelligence Profile
summary: GenAI-specific companion to the NIST AI RMF with risks and actions for generative AI systems.
auditUse: Use to adapt AI RMF control work to LLMs, multimodal models, and generative AI applications.

title: ISO/IEC 42001:2023 Artificial Intelligence Management System
summary: Specifies requirements for establishing, implementing, maintaining, and improving an AI management system.
auditUse: Use when designing auditable AI governance processes and certification-aligned controls.

title: ISO/IEC 23894:2023 Artificial Intelligence Guidance on Risk Management
summary: Provides guidance for managing risks related to AI systems.
auditUse: Use to align AI risk assessments with ISO risk management vocabulary and processes.

title: OECD AI Principles
summary: Intergovernmental principles for trustworthy AI, adopted in 2019 and updated in 2024.
auditUse: Use as a policy baseline for human-centric, rights-respecting AI governance.

title: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 Artificial Intelligence Act
source: Official Journal of the European Union
summary: Risk-based EU regulation establishing harmonized rules for AI systems and general-purpose AI models.
auditUse: Use for regulatory scoping, high-risk system obligations, documentation, risk management, and human oversight.

title: Ethics Guidelines for Trustworthy AI
organization: European Commission High-Level Expert Group on AI
summary: Guidelines and assessment list organized around lawful, ethical, and robust AI.
auditUse: Use to structure qualitative assessment of human agency, technical robustness, privacy, transparency, fairness, and accountability.

title: AI Verify
summary: AI governance testing framework and toolkit developed by Singapore's IMDA.
auditUse: Use for measurable testing against governance principles and for examples of test report structure.

title: Artificial Intelligence Accountability Framework
summary: Framework organized around governance, data, performance, and monitoring for AI accountability.
auditUse: Use as a highly audit-friendly structure for evidence requests and federal/public-sector AI review.

title: OWASP Top 10 for Large Language Model Applications
summary: Community-maintained list of major security risks for LLM applications.
auditUse: Use for LLM application threat modeling, control testing, and security audit scoping.

title: MITRE ATLAS
summary: Knowledge base of adversary tactics and techniques against AI-enabled systems.
auditUse: Use to map AI-specific threats to controls, tests, and monitoring signals.

title: Secure AI Framework
summary: Conceptual framework for securing AI systems and adapting security controls to AI risk.
auditUse: Use to review AI security foundations, detection, response, platform controls, and feedback loops.
